README.title: README
README.content:
Disney Universal Quartz Builder
Local Quartz source used to build the public static site.
Workflow

Keep the private vault in obsidian/Disney-Universal-KB/
Run ./scripts/build-public-site.sh
The script syncs selected vault content into content/
Quartz builds the static site locally
The generated output and Assets/ are copied into site-publish/disney-universal-kb/
Push that repo when you want to publish

Notes

node_modules/, public/, and .quartz-cache/ are ignored in the workspace repo
The public GitHub repo is intentionally static-output only
